data.body:
Progress + honest residual (session 2026-07-03).

LANDED ON MAIN (Gerrit 256):
- Phase 1 baseline dual-write SHADOW — new baseline_shadow.py; when reconciler.baseline_dual_write=true, every persisting pass advances a per-binding baseline from curr WITHOUT any consumer reading it, logging baseline_shadow_check {equal,divergent,seeded} vs prev_snapshot and baseline_shadow_divergence on M>0. Wired into reconcile._persist_and_log before save(); flag off by default; fail-open. Tests: tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_baseline_shadow.py.
- Rollback procedure + the workflow_dispatch mode brake + circuit breaker + dual-write shadow documented in docs/jira-sync-setup.md (## Convergence rollout & rollback).
- Circuit breaker (check_blast_radius, default 0.10) is already ENFORCED before the first acting mutation for the level-triggered walk's decisions (terminal-transition / retire / adopt) — landed with 249/253; refuses a mass-retire/mass-transition/mass-adopt pass.

REMAINING CODE (safe to do, not yet done):
- Phase 3 consumer swap: re-point outbound_fields._local_matches_prev from prev_snapshot to BindingStore.get_baseline behind a flag, preserving absent-baseline->local-wins + corrupt-store fail-closed + direction arbitration byte-for-byte, with the RED direction-preservation property test against the swapped consumer. Deliberately NOT flipped: the epic's own risk plan requires >=10 clean shadow passes first.
- decision_census emitted every pass in EVERY mode (report + acting) + classifier-vs-legacy divergence alerting in shadow (Phase 2 breadth beyond the walk's per-pass census).

REMAINING OPERATIONAL (CANNOT run in an agent session — needs live production Jira + the deployed 20-min workflow):
- >=10 consecutive clean live shadow passes (baseline_shadow_check divergent==0), ~3.5h wall clock, before flipping the Phase-3 consumer.
- Capped live heal under bootstrap-strict of the 7 known drift instances (REB-464/456/465/466/457 terminal, f8b5->REB-530 GC, REB-532 adopt); assert next-pass census = 0 acting.

This ticket stays in_progress: the detection + heals for classes A/B/C/D are live on main and their tickets are closed+signed, and the safe rollout derisk (dual-write shadow + rollback controls) is landed, but the consumer-swap flip and the live-pass validation are the operational tail owned by the deployed reconcile-bridge workflow.
